steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: In $K(v)=\frac{1}{2}(38)(v^2)$, the input $v$ is speed in meters per second, and the output $K(v)$ is kinetic energy in joules.

steps.title: Interpret K(3)=171
steps.content: $K(3)=171$ means that when $v=3$, the kinetic energy is $171$. In context, when the object is traveling at $3$ meters per second, its kinetic energy is $171$ joules.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: C states this interpretation. The other choices introduce mass or height as the input or output, but the input is speed and the output is kinetic energy.
